---
name: Correction
about: Fix an error, or resolve something marked Unresolved
title: 'Correction: <note name>'
labels: correction
---

## The note

<!-- Path or name of the note. -->

## The line

<!-- Quote it. -->

## What is wrong

<!-- What it says, and what it should say. -->

## How you know

<!-- One of: a link, a paper, or "I was at the talk and it was X". Being in the room counts as a source here. If you are only suspicious and cannot source it, say that. A flagged doubt is a real contribution and you do not have to resolve it yourself. -->

---

<!-- Resolving an item from a note's Unresolved section is the most valuable correction there is. If you know what a misheard term was, this is the place. -->
